response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: Highly consistent. The reference lyrics match the audio tracks ("Genesis" and the Japanese version of "id:entity voices") extremely well, with minor phonetic variations transcribed directly from raw audio (e.g., '奏でるから' instead of 'かな', and 'その先へ' instead of 'その方へ').
2. JSON Usage: Fully integrated the reference lyrics for translation and transcribed remaining speech elements (such as Call-to-actions like 'Let's celebrate the New Year!') manually.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are tightly matched to vocal bursts to avoid cascading delays, and prominent on-screen text graphics (like '2nd STAGE') are translated as visual cues.

subtitles.original: [On-Screen: hololive production COUNTDOWN LIVE 2025 -> 2026]
subtitles.english: [On-Screen: hololive production COUNTDOWN LIVE 2025 -> 2026]

subtitles.original: [On-Screen: COUNTDOWN LIVE 2025]
subtitles.english: [On-Screen: COUNTDOWN LIVE 2025]

subtitles.original: [On-Screen: 2nd STAGE]
subtitles.english: [On-Screen: 2nd STAGE]

subtitles.original: 君に届けたい
subtitles.english: I want to reach you

subtitles.original: id:entity
subtitles.english: id:entity

subtitles.original: ステージに一歩を 踏み出した
subtitles.english: I took a step onto the stage

subtitles.original: おはよう! こんばんは! と
subtitles.english: Good morning! Good evening!

subtitles.original: 世界に 叫んでみよう
subtitles.english: Let's shout it out to the world!

subtitles.original: 本日のライブでは
subtitles.english: For today's live performance,

subtitles.original: どれの自分を見せるの?
subtitles.english: which side of myself should I show?

subtitles.original: 前からそう悩んで
subtitles.english: I've been worrying about it for so long,

subtitles.original: 好きな自分になれない
subtitles.english: unable to become the self that I like.

subtitles.original: そしてある日 誰かに言われた
subtitles.english: And then one day, someone said to me...

subtitles.original: 痛い言葉なんかに 迷っていた
subtitles.english: I was lost in those hurtful words

subtitles.original: いつも映る笑顔
subtitles.english: So that I won't lose...

subtitles.original: 失わないように
subtitles.english: ...the smile that is always reflected.

subtitles.original: これ以上は 期待を
subtitles.english: I decided not to betray...

subtitles.original: 裏切らないと決めた
subtitles.english: ...expectations anymore.

subtitles.original: 溢れている雑音の中で
subtitles.english: Amidst the overflowing noise,

subtitles.original: この声響けるか?
subtitles.english: can this voice of mine resonate?

subtitles.original: 心に宿る 声を聞いてみよう
subtitles.english: Let's listen to the voice dwelling inside my heart.

subtitles.original: これはずっと見せたい 自分だった
subtitles.english: This is the self I've wanted to show all along.

subtitles.original: 集まった声たちが
subtitles.english: The gathered voices...

subtitles.original: ひとつになる id:entity
subtitles.english: ...become one id:entity!

subtitles.original: 日々が過ぎて やっとスポットライトに
subtitles.english: As the days pass, I finally stand in the spotlight,

subtitles.original: 立てるけれど少しだけ 怖くなった
subtitles.english: but it got just a little scary.

subtitles.original: でもね! 一人じゃない
subtitles.english: But you see! I am not alone,

subtitles.original: 仲間たちがいるんだ
subtitles.english: I have my companions with me.

subtitles.original: 家族みたいな絆で
subtitles.english: With a bond just like a family,

subtitles.original: 違いが分かり合えた
subtitles.english: we were able to understand our differences.

subtitles.original: それぞれの輝きがあって
subtitles.english: Each of us has our own unique shine,

subtitles.original: ハーモニー奏でるから
subtitles.english: so let's play our harmony together!

subtitles.original: 手をつないで 共に夢のその先へ
subtitles.english: Hand in hand, let's head towards the future of our dreams.

subtitles.original: 精一杯 歓声を上げよう
subtitles.english: Let's give it our all and raise our voices in cheer!

subtitles.original: 幸せを届けるんだ
subtitles.english: We will deliver happiness!

subtitles.original: どこにだって響けよ
subtitles.english: Resonate everywhere!

subtitles.original: 新しい舞台に
subtitles.english: Into a brand new stage,

subtitles.original: 飛び込んで
subtitles.english: ...we dive!
